title: Materials Science Lab at MIT Manipal
caption: Materials science research at MIT Manipal
summary: Hands-on thin film synthesis and characterization in the materials science laboratory.
description: Working in the materials science laboratory at MIT Manipal on metal chalcogenide thin films for photoelectrochemical applications. This involved thermal evaporation synthesis, structural characterization using XRD and SEM, and electrochemical analysis with EIS and Mott-Schottky techniques.

title: Hydrogen Economy Research
caption: Exploring clean hydrogen energy solutions
summary: Research focused on hydrogen fuel cells and sustainable energy storage systems.
description: Exploring innovative solutions for clean energy with emphasis on the hydrogen economy. Research spans PEC water splitting, materials for energy devices, and computational modelling using DFT simulations to validate experimental findings.

title: Fluorescence Microscopy at RGIPT
caption: Fluorescence microscopy at RGIPT
summary: Super-resolution imaging using fluorescence spectroscopy and SMLM data analysis.
description: Summer research fellowship at RGIPT involving single-molecule localization microscopy (SMLM). Developed a Python pipeline for 2D Gaussian fitting and drift correction, and authored an SOP for a prism-type TIRF microscope.

title: Full-Stack Development at IR INFOTECH
caption: Full-stack development at IR INFOTECH
summary: Building scalable web applications with Next.js, NestJS, and modern deployment pipelines.
description: Leading R&D at IR INFOTECH with integration of new tech stacks for client projects. Built the IR INTERNSHIP Portal with responsive Next.js frontend, NestJS REST APIs, and deployment on Vercel and VPS infrastructure.
highlights: Agile project management and Scrum leadership

title: Academic Conference & Presentations
caption: Academic conference and presentations
summary: Presenting research findings at academic conferences and institutional seminars.
description: Participated in academic conferences presenting work on materials science, hydrogen energy, and computational physics. Engaged with peers and faculty on sustainable energy research and interdisciplinary collaboration opportunities.

title: Collaborative Research & Project Work
caption: Collaborative research and project work
summary: Team-based research projects spanning Agrobot, thin films, and software development.
description: Collaborated with interdisciplinary teams on projects including the Agrobot agricultural robot at SDM College, thin film research at MIT Manipal, and full-stack portal development at IR INFOTECH. These experiences strengthened communication, project coordination, and technical leadership skills.
